extension.description: Spec-driven AI coding assistant — requirements, design, tasks, and implementation in one IDE workflow.

configuration.nexuscode.apiEndpoint.desc: OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint (LM Studio, Ollama, vLLM, OpenAI, etc.).
configuration.nexuscode.model.descriptio: The name or path of the model to use.
configuration.nexuscode.apiKey.descripti: API key (leave empty for local servers). Prefer the 'NexusCode: Set API Key' command — keys are stored in VS Code SecretStorage, not settings.json.
configuration.nexuscode.maxVerificationR: Maximum times the Verifier may reject and re-prompt the Coder per file.
